reach_why: Extends familiar benchmark-leakage and path-dependence critiques to thought-experiment evaluation, but does not open wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links iconic-thought benchmark leakage, recursive search compounding, and Einstein’s conjecture-to-mathematics gap.
falsifiable_why: Compare leakage-controlled benchmarks and compounding ablations; test whether familiar abstractions dominate and mathematical completion fails.
explanation: Benchmark success may reflect retrieval and self-reinforcing familiar conjectures, not genuine knowledge creation.
